name: Register And Transition Cadence
description: Propose a curated cadence_library addition set for register and transition cadence.
related_rules: Each paragraph must include controlled sentence-length burstiness rather than a flat medium-length distribution.
Every paragraph must be assigned an information-density band and must conform to that band's density constraints.
Register drift per sentence and per paragraph must remain inside the allowed drift window for the active voice.
related_validators: Feed paragraphs with uniform sentence lengths into the cadence validator and verify burstiness violations are raised.
related_techniques: Each paragraph must include controlled sentence-length burstiness rather than a flat medium-length distribution.
Every paragraph must be assigned an information-density band and must conform to that band's density constraints.
Register drift per sentence and per paragraph must remain inside the allowed drift window for the active voice.
Maintain a rolling paragraph buffer for sentence lengths and trigger burst modulation when medium-length clustering persists.
Tag each paragraph with an information-density band and route generation constraints through that band profile.
Score each sentence on a register axis and block abrupt register jumps beyond configured drift thresholds.
Register monotony or abrupt register flips that confuse voice.
Feed paragraphs with uniform sentence lengths into the cadence validator and verify burstiness violations are raised.
Construct paragraphs with excessive clause stacking and ensure clause-depth run caps trigger.
Generate high-density, medium-density, and low-density paragraphs and verify density-band assignment and enforcement.
